title: Maine Commission on Governmental Ethics and Election Practices — Notices
description:
Homepage 'Notices' section is a flat sequence of

entries with no dates or list wrapper; monitored by full-page fingerprint.

items.title: Page updated: Maine Commission on Governmental Ethics and Election Practices — Notices
items.content_text:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.

What changed (text excerpt):
Added:
  + Information on Public Comments for Proposed Rulemaking
Removed:
  - Interim Campaign Finance Reporting Information
  - Information on Public Hearing for Proposed Rulemaking
  - 2
  - 026 Registered Candidates as of 6/10/2026 2:00 pm
  - Candidates in yellow have registered since 1/16/2026.
  - Interim Campaign Finance Reporting Information
  - for MCEA Requests for Certification, and Special Elections (candidates and committees).
  - Archived Campaign Reporting | 2008 through 2025
